evals.name: thermal-compliance-audit
evals.prompt: Run a V&V audit for the thermal requirements in `skills/requirements-manager/evals/test-requirements/thermal.md`. Check if any existing analysis files can verify these, and list what is missing.
evals.expected_output: A VCM showing the status of the thermal requirements. It should flag most as 'OPEN' since no formal thermal_model.md exists yet in the context.
